data.title: Content Protection
data.description: Ensures licensed content is protected against unauthorized access and distribution.
data.technical_spec: Deploys multi-DRM services including Google Widevine and Microsoft PlayReady.

data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Encrypts all user data to prevent unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes TLS for data in transit and AES-256 for data at rest.

data.title: Access Management
data.description: Implements stringent access controls and monitoring to protect resources.
data.technical_spec: Role-based access controls combined with multi-factor authentication.

data.title: Fraud Detection
data.description: Detects and prevents credential stuffing and account takeover attempts.
data.technical_spec: Machine learning models analyze login behavior patterns for anomalies.

data.title: Security Audits
data.description: Regular assessments to identify vulnerabilities in the system.
data.technical_spec: Involves bug bounty programs and static/dynamic application security testing.
